summary: Iteration 22: Code Quality Refactor Regression Testing Complete. All 110 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Login, Dashboard with SLA widget, Screening Hub with Individual/Bulk tabs, SLA column in history table, Bulk screening upload/download flow, Settings SLA tab with RBI defaults.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly (known from iteration 20-21)

passed_tests: Login with shyam@rudrik.io / Assword@0231 works correctly
Dashboard loads with SLA Compliance Monitor widget (1.9h turnaround, 4d case resolution, 74% compliance)
Dashboard shows 4 stat cards (Total Customers, Pending Reviews, High Risk, Open Cases)
Screening page loads with Individual/Bulk tabs
Screening history table shows SLA column with ON TIME status
Bulk Upload tab shows Download CSV Template button
Bulk Upload tab shows file upload dropzone with Choose File button
Batch History section shows 10 batches
Settings page loads with SLA Targets tab
SLA Targets tab shows RBI Compliance Defaults (Active)
SLA configuration shows: KYC Screening 2hrs, Case Resolution 168hrs, STR Filing 7 days, EDD 7 days, SAR 24hrs
Auto-Escalation on Breach toggle is enabled
Save SLA Configuration button is present
Test files import credentials from conftest.py (no hardcoded secrets) - VERIFIED
Frontend uses sessionStorage via secureStorage.js (no localStorage for API keys) - VERIFIED
All 29 SLA tests passed
All 23 Bulk Screening tests passed
All 22 Sanctions.io tests passed
All 21 FATF tests passed
All 15 DigiLocker tests passed
critical_code_review_comments: All test files correctly import TEST_EMAIL, TEST_PASSWORD, BASE_URL from conftest.py - no hardcoded credentials
Frontend correctly uses sessionStorage via secureStorage.js wrapper instead of localStorage for API keys
SLA metrics, breaches, Sanctions.io, DigiLocker all in demo mode as expected (MOCKED)
Chart width/height console warnings are cosmetic only - charts render correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactor regression testing complete. Key verifications: (1) test files import credentials from conftest.py, (2) frontend uses sessionStorage via secureStorage.js for API keys, (3) all existing features work correctly. No new features added - this was a code quality refactor only.
